system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dinhmuc_history_reload","body":"


CREATE   PROC [dbo].[TR_DINHMUC_HISTORY_RELOAD]
(
	@ngaythang date
)
AS

--DECLARE @ngaythang date = '2024-03-25'
DECLARE @masp NVARCHAR(200)
DECLARE @dinhmuc NVARCHAR(50)
DECLARE @trangthai NVARCHAR(50)


BEGIN TRY

	DECLARE CUR CURSOR LOCAL FOR
		SELECT masp, dinhmuc, trangthai
		FROM tr_dinhmuc_history
		WHERE ngaythang = @ngaythang
	OPEN CUR
	FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @masp, @dinhmuc, @trangthai
	WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
	BEGIN
		IF @trangthai = 'INSERT'
		BEGIN
			IF @dinhmuc = 'GVA'
			BEGIN
				IF EXISTS (SELECT id FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan_history3 WHERE masp = @masp AND ngaythang = @ngaythang)
				BEGIN
					DELETE tr_dinhmuc_govan_history3 WHERE masp = @masp AND ngaythang = @ngaythang
				END
				INSERT INTO tr_dinhmuc_govan_history3
				(
					id, ngaythang, masp, mact, stt_new, tenct_new, nguyenlieu_new,
					dayy_tc_new, rong_tc_new, dai_tc_new, soluong_tc_new, ghichu_new,
					mong1_new, mong2_new,
					veneer_matchinh_new, veneer_matphu_new,
					veneer_dan_canh_new, veneer_canhngan_new, veneer_canhdai_new,
					uv_matchinh_new, uv_matphu_new, uv_canhngan_new, uv_canhdai_new,
					actions_type, ngaysua, nguoisua
				)
				SELECT NEWID(), @ngaythang, @masp, mact, stt, chitiet, nguyenlieu,
					dayy_tc, rong_tc, dai_tc, soluong_tc, ghichu,
					mong1, mong2,
					veneer_matchinh, veneer_matphu,
					veneer_dan_canh, veneer_canhngan, veneer_canhdai,
					uv_matchinh, uv_matphu, uv_canhngan, uv_canhdai,
					'I', ngaysua, nguoisua
				FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan
				WHERE masp = @masp
			END
			ELSE IF @dinhmuc = 'NKI'
			BEGIN
				IF EXISTS (SELECT id FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim_history3 WHERE masp = @masp AND ngaythang = @ngaythang)
				BEGIN
					DELETE tr_dinhmuc_ngukim_history3 WHERE masp = @masp AND ngaythang = @ngaythang
				END
				INSERT INTO tr_dinhmuc_ngukim_history3
				(
					id, ngaythang, masp, mact_new, soluong_new, 
					truocson_new, sauson_new, ai_new, ghichu_new, id_dinhmuc,
					actions_type, ngaysua, nguoisua,
					tenct_new, quycach_new, mausac_new
				)
				SELECT NEWID(), @ngaythang, @masp, A.mavt, A.soluong,
					A.HWforWW, A.HWforPacking, A.HWforAI, A.ghichu, A.id_dinhmuc,
					'I', A.ngaysua, A.nguoisua,
					B.mota, B.quycach, B.mausac
				FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim A
					INNER JOIN tr_material B ON A.mavt = B.mavt
				WHERE A.masp = @masp
			END
			ELSE IF @dinhmuc = 'DGO'
			BEGIN
				IF EXISTS (SELECT id FROM tr_dinhmuc_donggoi_history3 WHERE masp = @masp AND ngaythang = @ngaythang)
				BEGIN
					DELETE tr_dinhmuc_donggoi_history3 WHERE masp = @masp AND ngaythang = @ngaythang
				END
				INSERT INTO tr_dinhmuc_donggoi_history3
				(
					id, ngaythang, masp, mact_new, soluong_new, ispacking_new, ghichu_new,
					id_dinhmuc, actions_type, ngaysua, nguoisua,
					tenct_new, quycach_new, mausac_new
				)
				SELECT NEWID(), @ngaythang, @masp, A.madonggoi, A.soluong, A.IsPacking, A.ghichu,
					A.id_dinhmuc, 'I', A.ngaysua, A.nguoisua,
					B.mota, B.quycach, B.mausac
				FROM tr_dinhmuc_donggoi A
					INNER JOIN tr_material B ON A.madonggoi = B.mavt
				WHERE A.masp = @masp
			END
			ELSE IF @dinhmuc = 'SON'
			BEGIN
				IF EXISTS (SELECT id FROM tr_dinhmuc_son_history3 WHERE masp = @masp AND ngaythang = @ngaythang)
				BEGIN
					DELETE tr_dinhmuc_son_history3 WHERE masp = @masp AND ngaythang = @ngaythang
				END
				INSERT INTO tr_dinhmuc_son_history3
				(
					id, ngaythang, masp, stt_new, buoc_new, m2_new, sl_m2_new, sl_sp_new,
					sontrongsanpham_new, ghichu_new, id_dinhmuc,
					actions_type, ngaysua, nguoisua,
					tenct_new, quycach_new, mausac_new
				)
				SELECT NEWID(), @ngaythang, @masp, A.stt, A.buoc, A.m2, A.sl_m2, A.sl_sp,
					A.sontrongsanpham, A.ghichu, A.id_dinhmuc,
					'I', A.ngaysua, A.nguoisua,
					B.mota, B.quycach, B.mausac
				FROM tr_dinhmuc_son A
					INNER JOIN tr_material B ON A.mact = B.mavt
				WHERE A.masp = @masp
			END
		END
		ELSE IF @trangthai = 'UPDATE'
		BEGIN
			IF @dinhmuc = 'GVA'
			BEGIN
				EXEC TR_DINHMUC_GOVAN_HISTORY3_RELOAD @masp, @ngaythang
			END
			ELSE IF @dinhmuc = 'NKI'
			BEGIN
				EXEC TR_DINHMUC_NGUKIM_HISTORY3_RELOAD @masp, @ngaythang
			END
			ELSE IF @dinhmuc = 'DGO'
			BEGIN
				EXEC TR_DINHMUC_DONGGOI_HISTORY3_RELOAD @masp, @ngaythang
			END
			ELSE IF @dinhmuc = 'SON'
			BEGIN
				EXEC TR_DINHMUC_SON_HISTORY3_RELOAD @masp, @ngaythang
			END
		END

		FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @masp, @dinhmuc, @trangthai
	END
	CLOSE CUR
	DEALLOCATE CUR


END TRY
BEGIN CATCH
	PRINT 'ERROR'
END CATCH","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.cur","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi_history3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan_history3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_history","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim_history3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_history3","dbo.tr_material"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi_history3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan_history3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim_history3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_history3"],"flags":["has-try-catch","has-cursor","has-while","calls-other-proc","writes-multi-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
